Terms of Use

Last updated: April 20, 2026

By using CaloricLab ("the Service"), you agree to these Terms of Use. If you do not agree, please do not use the Service.

Informational Purposes Only

All content on CaloricLab, including calculator results, articles, and other materials, is provided for informational and educational purposes only. Nothing on this site constitutes medical advice, nutritional advice, or a substitute for professional consultation with a qualified healthcare provider.

Calculator results are estimates based on population averages and established mathematical formulas. Individual results will vary. Always consult a registered dietitian or physician before making significant changes to your diet or exercise routine.

No Warranties

CaloricLab is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied. We make no guarantee that calculator results will be accurate for any specific individual or that the Service will be available without interruption.

Limitation of Liability

CaloricLab and its operators shall not be liable for any damages arising from your use of the Service, including but not limited to decisions made based on calculator results or content on this site.

Intellectual Property

All content on CaloricLab, including text, design, and code, is the property of CaloricLab and may not be reproduced without permission. Calculator results generated from your inputs are yours to use freely.

Acceptable Use

You agree not to use the Service to scrape, harvest, or automatically query our calculators at scale; attempt to interfere with or disrupt the Service; or use the Service in any way that violates applicable law.

Links to Third-Party Sites

CaloricLab may contain links to third-party websites. We are not responsible for the content or privacy practices of those sites.

Changes to These Terms

We reserve the right to update these terms at any time. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the new terms.

Contact

Questions about these terms? Contact us at hello@caloriclab.com.
